prompt: The moment [cooking transformation] occurs — [lens] locked at the exact distance where the transformation is the entire frame, [before state] visible at one edge giving way to [after state] spreading from [origin point], [light quality] the specific light of the [cooking environment] catching [visual transformation detail] as it develops, [surface or vessel] providing the geography of the transformation, the frame containing only the transformation and nothing else, cinematic cooking transformation still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
